task: I need a quick way to reply to a client who sent a vague note and wants a revised concept by end of day. Can you give me a couple of reply options — one very short and one a little more polished — so I can pick the cleanest one?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are two clean options you can use:

**Very short:**  
“Thanks — I’m reviewing this now and will send an updated concept by end of day.”

**A little more polished:**  
“Thanks for the note — I’m taking a look and will send over a revised concept by end of day.”

If you want, I can also give you a version that sounds a little firmer or more polished/client-facing.
